aboutme: I am a bachelor's student in Computer Science at the Federal University of Sergipe, and a voluntary member of SofTeam - the Junior Computing Company of DCOMP - UFS. I mainly develop using C# and .NET and its technologies, with knowledge in Dart, C, C++, and JavaScript.

projects.title: TMath
projects.description: A C# math library using generics to support various numeric types, with additional functionalities.

projects.title: DotSights
projects.description: Highly customizable screen usage tracker for Windows with a CLI application to view data through tables and graphs in the terminal.

projects.title: Basalt
projects.description: A game development framework where you can customize your own engine, allowing you to choose implementations for systems like renderers, physics simulators, sound systems, etc.

projects.title: SharpTables
projects.description: A C# library for viewing and formatting data using tables and graphs in the terminal. Fast and easy to use, and completely customizable, including the characters used for rendering everything.

projects.title: CircuitSim
projects.description: An electrical circuit simulator made in C# and rendered using Raylib.
